entries.title: Design Lead, Agentic Craft
entries.description: Lead the design practice and the cross-disciplinary craft of how people and agents do the work together across the delivery lifecycle. Built Genie, an agentic orchestration platform that automates routine design and delivery work so the team gets meaningful hours back for the problems that need a person. Own the Craft Standard and Design QA systems, and set front-end integration standards. Convene product, engineering, and QA on shared craft rather than owning it alone.
entries.callout: Built Genie, the agentic orchestration platform now used across delivery. Authored Orium's design leadership rubric and contract design and UX research hiring kits.

entries.title: Senior Product Designer
entries.description: Led product design across retail, healthcare, and SaaS clients, and grew into leading the front-end of Orium's composable-commerce accelerators. Architected and governed token-based design systems adopted across teams and platforms. Implemented production UI in React and Vue so design decisions survived handoff. Defined design quality standards that cut rework, and mentored designers on systems thinking and code.
entries.callout: Reduced design-to-development friction by approximately 60% through systemization. Shipped customer-facing products used by millions.

entries.title: Mindfulness Facilitator & Culture Lead
entries.description: Lead mindfulness and emotional intelligence initiatives supporting team well-being and focus. Facilitate onboarding and group sessions for cross-functional teams. Contribute to sustainable, human-centered team culture.

entries.title: UX Designer
entries.description: Designed accessible healthcare interfaces aligned with WCAG standards. Conducted usability testing with patients and clinicians.

entries.title: UI Designer Fellow
entries.description: Participated in design fellowship focused on product design, collaboration, and client delivery.

entries.title: Design & Prototyping
entries.description: Figma, FigJam, Adobe Creative Suite, Miro

entries.title: Development
entries.description: React, Vue.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, SCSS, Git

entries.title: Design Systems
entries.description: Design Tokens, Storybook, Component Libraries, Figma Variables

entries.title: AI & Automation
entries.description: Claude Code, Claude API, n8n, Agentic Orchestration, Agentic UX/AX, Prompt Engineering
